title: Connecticut General Statutes § 53a-46c — Applicability of death penalty provisions in effect on and after October 1, 1980
text: The provisions of sections 53a-46a and 53a-46b in effect on and after October 1, 1980, shall be applicable to any person who is convicted of or pleads guilty to a capital felony under subdivisions (1) to (6), inclusive, of section 53a-54b on or after June 13, 1983.
